trial_title: Luseogliflozin in patients with type 2 diabetes (POLUS)

inclusion_quantitative.source_text: Men and women aged 18 years and older.

inclusion_categorical.source_text: Treatment with luseogliflozin started 7 to 30 days prior to the inclusion visit as part of routine clinical practice

exclusion_categorical.source_text: Pregnancy, breastfeeding, or planned pregnancy during the study and at least two months after the study.
end-stage chronic kidney disease (CKD) or dialysis
Diabetic ketoacidosis, diabetic coma or precoma.
Any suspected or confirmed malignant neoplasm, including a history of malignancy within ≤5 years prior to screening

unparseable: Known hypersensitivity to luseogliflozin or other components of Lusefi®.
Severe infections, pre- and postoperative period, or severe injury.
